name: Anadolu Isuzu Otomotiv Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Anadolu Isuzu Otomotiv Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells commercial vehicles in Turkey. The company offers light and heavy duty trucks, midi buses, buses, and pick-up vehicles. It also engages in the sale of spare parts for commercial vehicles. The company also exports commercial vehicles to Western Europe, Asia, and South America. Anadolu Isuzu Otomotiv Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
